narrative:
Fairfield Township has 1,047 registered voters, with 47.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.4 percentage points.
